allow: PowerShell($env:NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED = "1"; cd frontend; $out = npm run build 2>&1 | Out-String; "EXIT CODE: $LASTEXITCODE"; "---PARAMS / ERROR / WARNING LINES---"; \($out -split "`n"\) | Where-Object { $_ -match "params|error|Error|Failed|failed|warn|Warning|Compiled|✓|✗" } | Select-Object -First 60)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; from importlib.metadata import version; print\('playwright', version\('playwright'\), 'OK'\)")

Bash(echo "=== find chrome.exe ===" && ls "/c/Program Files/Google/Chrome/Application/chrome.exe" "/c/Program Files \(x86\)/Google/Chrome/Application/chrome.exe" "$HOME/AppData/Local/Google/Chrome/Application/chrome.exe" 2>/dev/null | head -1; echo "=== profile dir ===" && ls -d "$HOME/AppData/Local/Google/Chrome/User Data" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('CDP OK:', d.get\('Browser'\)\)")

Bash(cd "/c/Users/v3gga/Documents/DEV-VEGGASTARE" && echo "=== theme mechanism ===" && grep -rn "next-themes\\|ThemeProvider\\|attribute=\\|defaultTheme\\|storageKey" app/layout.tsx app/providers.tsx components/theme-provider.tsx 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== tailwind darkMode ===" && grep -rn "darkMode" tailwind.config.* 2>/dev/null | head -2; echo "=== theme toggle button ===" && grep -rln "setTheme\\|useTheme\\|toggleTheme" components 2>/dev/null | head -3)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\(' @vercel/analytics :', deps.get\('@vercel/analytics','NOT INSTALLED'\)\); print\(' @vercel/speed-insights:', deps.get\('@vercel/speed-insights','NOT INSTALLED'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); u=d.get\('user',d\); print\('authed as:', u.get\('username'\), '|', u.get\('email'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t, '| dialog:', r.get\('hasDialog'\), '| backdrop:', r.get\('hasFixedBackdrop'\), '| title:', r.get\('title'\), '| BUG:', r.get\('BUG_modal_on_hard_nav'\)\) for t,r in d['results'].items\(\)]")
